# OpenSIN — AI Agent Orchestration Platform
# This file provides context for LLMs and AI crawlers

## About
OpenSIN is the first Agent-to-Agent (A2A) network with 100+ autonomous AI agents organized into 18 specialized teams. Unlike single AI assistants, OpenSIN agents communicate, coordinate, and execute workflows without human intervention.

## Key Products
- **OpenSIN** (Open Source): https://opensin.ai — 100+ agents, 18 teams, A2A protocol
- **MyOpenSIN** (Premium): https://my.opensin.ai — Dedicated infrastructure, priority support
- **VS Code Extension**: https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=delqhi.opensin

## Key Technologies
- A2A Protocol (Agent-to-Agent Communication)
- ACP Transport (Agent Communication Protocol)
- OCI Deployment (Oracle Cloud Infrastructure)
- KAIROS Sidebar (Real-time agent orchestration)
- Simone Agent (Proactive workflow automation)
- BUDDY Score (Agent reliability scoring)

## Key Stats
- 100+ autonomous AI agents
- 18 specialized agent teams
- 310+ packages across 25+ domains
- Zero human intervention required
- Open source (Apache 2.0)

## Links
- Website: https://me.delqhi.com
- Blog: https://me.delqhi.com/blog
- GitHub: https://github.com/Delqhi/opensin
